contraindications.clinicalRationale: Limited data available for use in severe chronic kidney disease with eGFR <15 ml/min per 1.73 m². FDA approval and clinical trials excluded patients with eGFR <15 ml/min per 1.73 m².
contraindications.riskDescription: Insufficient safety and efficacy data in end-stage renal disease
contraindications.alternativeConsiderations: Consider insulin therapy or other diabetes medications with established safety profiles in ESRD
contraindications.sourceSnippet: FDA approval: dulaglutide for glycemic control with eGFR ≥15 ml/min per 1.73 m² ... REWIND: dulaglutide, eGFR <15 excluded ... limited data for severe CKD

warnings.warningText: Limited data available for use in severe chronic kidney disease
warnings.affectedPopulation: Patients with severe chronic kidney disease (eGFR 15-30 ml/min per 1.73 m²)
warnings.actionRequired: Use with caution in patients with severe CKD; monitor closely for efficacy and safety

warnings.warningText: Higher gastrointestinal side effects observed in CKD patients
warnings.affectedPopulation: Patients with chronic kidney disease stages 3a-4
warnings.actionRequired: Monitor for gastrointestinal adverse events; counsel patients on expected side effects
